image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Science has a clearer story about hand hygiene than social media does.
Context visual: Most germs thrive on our hands. But how we wash them matters.
Escalation visual: Simply running them under water? Not enough! You need soap.
Evidence visual: Studies show washing for 20 seconds removes 99% of germs. So sing your favorite tune!
Payoff visual: Neglecting this can lead to illness, especially for the vulnerable. It’s simple but vital.
Cta visual: So, wash your hands regularly. Stay safe and share this knowledge!
